scored_papers.title: Radiatively Corrected Hybrid Inflation: Parameter Scans and Machine Learning with ACT and Future CMB Experiments
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate a realistic non-supersymmetric hybrid inflation model incorporating right-handed neutrinos and assess its viability in light of recent cosmological observations. One-loop quantum corrections flatten the potential, yielding red-tilted ns < 1 and suppressed r, consistent with Planck and ACT DR6. Efficient reheating and non-thermal leptogenesis via right-handed neutrinos are incorporated. Multi-output random forest classifier achieves 87.5-98.9% accuracy; ~15% of parameter space satisfies current constraints.
scored_papers.reason: 1ループ補正でns赤傾き→ACT DR6整合、将来CMB実験（LiteBIRD級）でのr制約をMLで探索📡 LiteBIRD科学目標に直結
scored_papers.summary: 非SUSY型ハイブリッドインフレ+右巻きニュートリノ：量子補正でns<1・r抑制、MLパラメタースキャンで将来CMBの制約予測
